aspectRatio.title: AspectRatio
aspectRatio.description: Maintains a fixed aspect ratio for media containers (image, video, iframe).

container.title: Container
container.description: Max-width + horizontal padding wrapper for page content.

hStack.title: HStack
hStack.description: Horizontal flex layout with gap, align, and justify props.

vStack.title: VStack
vStack.description: Vertical flex layout with gap, align, and justify props.

cluster.title: Cluster
cluster.description: Wrapping flex layout — items flow horizontally and wrap onto new lines.

grid.title: Grid
grid.description: CSS grid wrapper with cols, gap, and minItemWidth props.

scrollArea.title: ScrollArea
scrollArea.description: Custom scrollbar container with viewport and thumb controls.

resizable.title: Resizable
resizable.description: Pane group with draggable handle and optional grip indicator.

inspectorPanel.title: Inspector Panel
inspectorPanel.description: Structured side panel for detailed property editing.

spatialCanvas.title: Spatial Canvas
spatialCanvas.description: Large grid-based interaction surface for node and layout editing.

assetInspectorPanel.title: AssetInspectorPanel
assetInspectorPanel.description: Media library inspector panel for asset preview, title and note fields, tag editing, metadata rows, and asset actions.

deviceFrame.title: DeviceFrame
deviceFrame.description: Browser chrome frame with URL entry, visual chrome variants, and desktop, tablet, and mobile viewport controls for interactive pattern previews.

marqueeFrame.title: MarqueeFrame
marqueeFrame.description: Scaled fake-browser viewport wrapper for marquee pattern pages. It keeps pattern content and overlays scoped to the active preview viewport.

collapsiblePanelToggle.title: CollapsiblePanelToggle
collapsiblePanelToggle.description: Boundary control for opening and closing a collapsible panel from the left, right, top, or bottom edge.
